headlineSummary: Hacker News sentiment was most negative toward Microsoft Copilot on limited evidence, OpenAI drew mixed neutral reactions with one praise and one privacy critique, and Anthropic and Google Gemini were both viewed positively in a close tie [E4] [E1] [E5] [E2] [E3].

ranking.summary: Microsoft Copilot drew a clearly negative reaction, with one comment calling it one of the worse AIs currently available [E4].
OpenAI had mixed neutral sentiment: one comment praised ChatGPT’s quality, while another criticized its default privacy protection against data exfiltration [E1] [E5].
Anthropic was viewed positively, with Claude credited for handling an impressive embedded-systems task beyond the commenter’s expertise, in a close tie with Google Gemini [E2].
Google Gemini was viewed positively after a commenter said it immediately diagnosed a furnace issue, in a close tie with Anthropic [E3].

evidence.excerpt: Back when ChatGPT came out, I was so shocked by how _good_ it was for an “AI” product that I simply had to know how it worked.

annotations.rationale: The commenter explicitly names ChatGPT and strongly praises its quality as an AI product.

evidence.excerpt: Claude recently decompiled the firmware of my camper van, documented all the CAN interfaces, then programmed an ESP32 module to talk to the van’s integrated systems (power, HVAC, lighting, tanks). That sort of embedded systems integration is completely out of my wheelhouse.

annotations.rationale: The excerpt explicitly names Claude and credits it with impressively capable technical work beyond the user's own expertise.

evidence.excerpt: I went into my attic and made several videos of the furnace attempting to start and gave it to gemini. It diagnosed the issue immediately

annotations.rationale: The commenter explicitly names gemini and praises its immediate successful diagnosis of a furnace problem.

evidence.excerpt: they also end up using Copilot which must be one of the worse AIs currently available, probably because of existing Microsoft relations.

annotations.rationale: The commenter explicitly names Copilot and calls it one of the worst AIs currently available, which is strong criticism of quality.

evidence.excerpt: The existence of lockdown mode does however imply that ChatGPT, in its default settings, does not provide robust protection against sufficiently determined data exfiltration attacks!

annotations.rationale: The commenter explicitly names ChatGPT and strongly criticizes its default security/privacy protections against data exfiltration.
